payload.answer: Extracted supported memory takeaways: Sam left Goldman last month and joined Point72; Sam still listens to Bill Evans and lately more early Coltrane; Sam is open to catching up with Daniele about AI infra and asked for the article.
citations: Daniele: Still at Goldman? Sam: No, I left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Daniele: Still listening to Bill Evans? Sam: Yes, but lately more early Coltrane.
Daniele: We should catch up about AI infra. Sam: Definitely, send me that article.
